title: Gooey Cheesy Croatian Lamb Tagine
description: A hearty, cheesy Croatian dish featuring lamb, red wine, and dashi extract, perfect for a lazy Sunday. This flexitarian-friendly recipe is cooked in a traditional tajine clay vessel.

ingredients.name: cheese
ingredients.notes: shredded, Croatian cheese or substitute with cheddar

instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat the olive oil in the bottom of a tajine clay vessel over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until they are browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the red wine, dashi extract, salt, and black pepper, stirring to combine.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes, stirring to combine.
Cover the tajine with a lid and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 2.5 hours, or until the lamb is tender and the vegetables are cooked through.
Remove the tajine from the oven and stir in the shredded cheese until it is melted and gooey.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
